Class Adopter

java.lang.Object
shelter.domain.Adopter
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<Adopter>
public class Adopter extends Object implements Comparable<Adopter>
Represents a prospective adopter seeking to adopt an animal from a shelter. An adopter holds personal information, lifestyle context (living space and daily schedule), and explicit adoption preferences that are used during the animal matching process.

    Adopter(Adopter other)
    Copy constructor that creates a new Adopter with all field values copied from other.

  • Constructor Details

    • Adopter

      public Adopter(String id, String name, LivingSpace livingSpace, DailySchedule dailySchedule, String personalNotes, AdopterPreferences preferences, List<String> adoptedAnimalIds)
      Reconstruction constructor for deserializing an Adopter from persistent storage. This constructor accepts an explicit id and a pre-populated list of adopted animal IDs so that the full adopter state can be restored from CSV data.
      Parameters:
      id - the pre-existing unique identifier; must not be null or blank
      name - the adopter's full name; must not be null or blank
      livingSpace - the adopter's living space type; must not be null
      dailySchedule - the adopter's typical daily schedule; must not be null
      personalNotes - any additional context provided by the adopter; may be null
      preferences - the adopter's adoption preferences; must not be null
      adoptedAnimalIds - the list of animal IDs this adopter has previously adopted; may be empty
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any required parameter is null or name is blank

    • Adopter

      public Adopter(String name, LivingSpace livingSpace, DailySchedule dailySchedule, String personalNotes, AdopterPreferences preferences)
      Constructs a new Adopter with the given personal information and preferences. name, livingSpace, dailySchedule, and preferences are required; personalNotes may be null if the adopter provides no extra context.
      Parameters:
      name - the adopter's full name; must not be null or blank
      livingSpace - the adopter's living space type; must not be null
      dailySchedule - the adopter's typical daily schedule; must not be null
      personalNotes - any additional context provided by the adopter; may be null
      preferences - the adopter's adoption preferences; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any required parameter is null or name is blank

    • Adopter

      public Adopter(Adopter other)
      Copy constructor that creates a new Adopter with all field values copied from other. The adopted animal IDs list is defensively copied so modifications to one do not affect the other.
      Parameters:
      other - the Adopter instance to copy; must not be null

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Returns the unique identifier of this adopter. The ID is generated automatically at construction and never changes.
      Returns:
      the UUID string identifying this adopter

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the full name of this adopter.
      Returns:
      the adopter's name

    • getLivingSpace

      public LivingSpace getLivingSpace()
      Returns the type of living space this adopter has. Used by lifestyle-based matching strategies to filter compatible animals.
      Returns:
      the adopter's LivingSpace

    • getDailySchedule

      public DailySchedule getDailySchedule()
      Returns the typical daily schedule of this adopter. Used by lifestyle-based matching strategies to assess time available for the animal.
      Returns:
      the adopter's DailySchedule

    • getPersonalNotes

      public String getPersonalNotes()
      Returns any personal notes provided by the adopter. May be null if the adopter did not supply additional information.
      Returns:
      the adopter's personal notes, or null

    • getPreferences

      public AdopterPreferences getPreferences()
      Returns the adoption preferences of this adopter.
      Returns:
      the adopter's AdopterPreferences

    • getAdoptedAnimalIds

      public List<String> getAdoptedAnimalIds()
      Returns an unmodifiable list of IDs of animals this adopter has adopted. Returns an empty list if the adopter has not yet adopted any animals.
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable list of adopted animal ID strings

    • addAdoptedAnimalId

      public void addAdoptedAnimalId(String animalId)
      Records that this adopter has adopted an animal with the given ID. Typically called by AdoptionService when an adoption request is approved.
      Parameters:
      animalId - the ID of the adopted animal; must not be null or blank
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if animalId is null or blank

    • compareTo

      public int compareTo(Adopter other)
      Compares this adopter to another by name alphabetically.
      Specified by:
      compareTo in interface Comparable<Adopter>
      Parameters:
      other - the other Adopter to compare to
      Returns:
      a negative number if this name comes first, positive if later, zero if equal

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object o)
      Returns true if the given object is an Adopter with the same ID. Adopter identity is determined solely by UUID.
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object
      Parameters:
      o - the object to compare
      Returns:
      true if o is an Adopter with the same ID

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code based on this adopter's unique ID. Consistent with equals(Object).
      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object
      Returns:
      the hash code

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this adopter including ID, name, living space, and schedule.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a human-readable description of this adopter
